name: McpSession-PowerShell
description: PowerShell module for MCP Session Log API. Provides cmdlets: Initialize-McpSession, New-McpSessionLog, Update-McpSessionLog, Get-McpSessionLog, Add-McpSessionEntry, Set-McpSessionEntry, Add-McpAction, Send-McpDialog. Save to McpSession.psm1 and Import-Module.
commandTemplate: Save this module to McpSession.psm1, then: Import-Module ./McpSession.psm1; Initialize-McpSession
